title: Session Object Schema
description: Schema for Session objects representing atomic units of research studies

session_type.description: Type of research session (interview, observation, survey, workshop, etc.)

session_date.description: Date and time when session occurred (ISO 8601 format)

participant_count.description: Number of participants in the session

researcher_id.description: Identifier of the researcher conducting the session

session_location.description: Physical or virtual location where session occurred

session_notes.description: High-level notes about session context or setup

transcript_url.description: URL to session transcript or notes

data_ids.description: Array of Data object IDs generated from this session

study_id.description: ID of the Study collection this session belongs to

tags.description: System-derived tags from DUX scan (not manually added)
